headline: How The Keurig Dr Pepper (KDP) Investment Story Is Shifting With Mixed Analyst Targets
summary: Recent research on Keurig Dr Pepper has pushed price targets in both directions, with bullish analysts nudging targets higher by US$1 to US$5 and some bearish firms cutting theirs by US$3 to US$6. This tug of war, including moves into the low to mid US$30s and one target at US$40 alongside reductions from banks such as JPMorgan and Deutsche Bank, gives you a real time snapshot of how professionals are recalibrating their views on execution and valuation. Read on to see how to track and...
